final:
module register (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	input load,
	input [7:0] data_in,
	output reg [7:0] data_out);

	  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
		if (reset) data_out <= 8'b00000000;
		else if (load) data_out <= data_in;
	end
	
endmodule
